page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-2x.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8469C processors running at a base clock speed of 2.6 GHz. The instance is configured with a single thread per core, resulting in 48 vCPUs. It includes 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 5.33 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the instance is equipped with two GPUs delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. It does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance.

The qualitative cost profile of this instance is defined by its high-density GPU memory and dedicated physical cores, making it a specialized resource for workloads requiring significant parallel processing capabilities. The lack of local storage and hyperthreading represents a design tradeoff that prioritizes predictable core performance and externalized storage management. This hardware configuration is suitable for GPU-accelerated workloads, machine learning model execution, data science jobs, and parallel computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-2x.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 48 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at 2.6 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with one thread per core, it provides 48 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory. The instance integrates two GPUs with a total of 192 GB of VRAM, making it highly capable for parallel processing tasks. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps but includes no local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions. With no hyperthreading and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this instance represents a specialized hardware profile. It is suitable for GPU-accelerated workloads, machine learning, and data science applications.
